meta_title: For Students: client workflow to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Debug Like a Pro: Student Client Workflow Guide
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with bugs. Master a high-level client workflow using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your development and build professional apps.
content.answer_block: To overcome debugging gridlock, adopt a structured client-side diagnostic workflow. By integrating Antigravity for real-time state analysis and Claude Code for iterative code reviews, you transform chaotic bugs into logical, solvable tasks. This systematic approach isolates errors, validates logic, and accelerates your path from student developer to professional engineer.
content.intro:
The screen is a blur of red text and stack traces, and the silence in your room feels heavy with frustration. You’ve been staring at the same function for three hours, knowing the logic is sound but the execution is failing. This isn't a lack of intelligence; it's a lack of a battle-tested workflow. Every senior engineer has been exactly where you are, trapped in the loop of 'why isn't this working?'

Transitioning from a student coder to an AI Builder requires more than just knowing syntax; it demands an architectural approach to troubleshooting. By leveraging modern AI agents like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can turn your IDE into a peer-programming powerhouse. It’s time to stop guessing and start engineering with precision.

steps.title: Isolate the State with Antigravity
steps.description: Before changing code, visualize the runtime state. Antigravity helps you capture the exact environment where the crash occurs.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current execution state and list all variables in scope that deviate from the expected schema. Identify the specific line where the state transition fails.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'analyze current state with Antigravity and identify the root cause'

steps.title: Define the Failure Boundary
steps.description: Use Claude Code to document the error boundary. By explicitly stating what works versus what breaks, you narrow the search space.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a diagnostic test case that replicates the current bug using the existing Antigravity state snapshot.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'what is the minimal reproduction case for this error?'

steps.title: Automated Code Review
steps.description: Feed your suspect code blocks into Claude Code to check for common architectural pitfalls or syntax oversights.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review this module for non-obvious race conditions or memory leaks that Antigravity reported in the logs.

steps.title: Apply Surgical Fixes
steps.description: Do not rewrite the entire file. Use Claude Code to apply a surgical patch based on the data provided by Antigravity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest a code change that fixes the state mismatch identified in step 1 without introducing side effects.

steps.title: Regression Validation
steps.description: Ensure your fix didn't break other parts of the app by running a full integration check.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the regression test suite and confirm that the previous bug is resolved and no new errors are introduced.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm test && check for regressions'

pro_tips: Always commit your 'broken' state to a separate branch before letting AI refactor; it gives you a clean rollback point.
Treat Antigravity logs as the 'Source of Truth'—if the code looks right but the logs say otherwise, trust the logs.
Use Claude Code's 'context' mode to feed it your entire project architecture, not just the single file you are debugging.
Practice 'Rubber Ducking' with Claude—explain the bug out loud to the AI to force your own brain to clarify the logic.
Keep a 'Bug Journal' of your fixes; identifying patterns in your mistakes is the fastest way to become a senior developer.
content.next_steps: Once your code is stable, focus on implementing unit tests for the functions you just fixed. This ensures the bug never resurfaces during your next feature sprint.
content.conversion_block: You now have the exact workflow used by top-tier engineers to ship faster and break less. Stop fighting your code and start commanding it. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
